    C

    com.lockedin.lockedin - module com.lockedin.lockedin
     
    com.lockedin.lockedin.app - package com.lockedin.lockedin.app
     

    J

    JohnDemoSeeder - Class in com.lockedin.lockedin.app
    Seeds a demo user "John" with sample diet, workout, and progress data for demonstrations.

    L

    LockedIn - Class in com.lockedin.lockedin.app
    Provides locked in functionality for LockedIn.
    LockedIn() - Constructor for class com.lockedin.lockedin.app.LockedIn
     

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class com.lockedin.lockedin.app.LockedIn
    Application entry point that launches the JavaFX runtime.

    R

    removeAll() - Static method in class com.lockedin.lockedin.app.JohnDemoSeeder
    Removes the demo user and all related data created by JohnDemoSeeder.seedIfAbsent().

    S

    seedIfAbsent() - Static method in class com.lockedin.lockedin.app.JohnDemoSeeder
    Seeds demo data for John if the demo account does not already exist.
    start(Stage) - Method in class com.lockedin.lockedin.app.LockedIn
    Performs start.
